title: Chevron Corporation — Official Website

note: Annual reports, earnings releases, and financial data used for profitability and moat assessment.

note: Product detail for Havoline consumer and Delo commercial lubricant lines.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor GitHub Organization
note: Source for openness and decentralization fit assessment of the OpenEnergyMonitor platform.

title: openHAB Core — GitHub
note: Open-source home automation platform used in home solar and battery stack alternative assessment.

title: OCPP Python Library — GitHub (Mobility House)
